Part.Source:
loadWWPContext.Call(&Context) If &Context.PesCod = 0 Return EndIf
&PesRaz = &Context.PesRaz For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod Where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod Where FilCod = &Context.FilCod &FilFan = FilFan Exit EndFor Do 'FilialSelecionada' &auxFilRaz = trim(str(&FolFilCod))+' - '+trim(&FilRaz)
MB 4 MT 2
Header &titulo = 'LISTAGEM DE FOLHA' print Cabecalho
Print MenuSintetico End
&index = 1 Do Case
Case &tipo = 1 //Sintético &FilTotFolVlrTot = 0 For each Order EmpCod,PesIsFun,PesSts,PesSetCod,PesRaz When &Ordem = 1 Order EmpCod,PesIsFun,PesSts,PesCod When &Ordem = 2 Order EmpCod,PesIsFun,PesSts,PesRaz When &Ordem = 3 Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PesIsFun = True Where PesSts = &PesSts Where PesSetCod = &SetCod when not &SetCod.IsEmpty() Where PesFunFilCod = &FolFilCod when not &FolFilCod.IsEmpty() //If (PesSalTotRec > 0) //#################################### FOLHA CONTÁBIL (QUENTE)######################################## &ConFolVlrCre = 0 &ConFolVlrDeb = 0 &ConFolVlrTot = 0
If PesSetCod <> &AuxSetCod and &Ordem = 1 If &index = 2 If &TotFolVlrTot > 0 Print TotalSetor
&FilTotFolVlrCre += &TotFolVlrCre &FilTotFolVlrDeb += &TotFolVlrDeb &FilTotFolVlrTot += &TotFolVlrTot EndIf &TotFolVlrCre = 0 &TotFolVlrDeb = 0 &TotFolVlrTot = 0 EndIf &PesSetNom = trim(str(PesSetCod))+' - '+trim(PesSetNom) &IsPrintSetor = True &AuxSetCod = PesSetCod &index = 2 EndIf
If &Ordem = 2 or &Ordem = 3 &FilTotFolVlrCre += &TotFolVlrCre &FilTotFolVlrDeb += &TotFolVlrDeb &FilTotFolVlrTot += &TotFolVlrTot &TotFolVlrCre = 0 &TotFolVlrDeb = 0 &TotFolVlrTot = 0 EndIf
&FolFunCod = PesCod &FolPesRaz = PesCodRaz &FucNom = FucNom For each Order EmpCod,FPagCod,FPagLcfCod Where FPagPesCod = &FolFunCod Where FPagAno = &FolAno Where FPagMes = &FolMes Where FPagTip = TipoPagamentoFolha.FolhaMensal
&LcfCod = FPagLcfCod do 'getOperacao' if &LcfCreDeb = 'C' &ConFolVlrCre += FPagItemVlr Else &ConFolVlrDeb += FPagItemVlr Endif
EndFor &ConFolVlrTot = (&ConFolVlrCre - &ConFolVlrDeb)
//#################################### FOLHA GERENCIAL (FRIA) ########################################
If &ConFolVlrTot > 0 //and &GerFolVlrTot = 0 If &IsPrintSetor = true and &Ordem = 1 Print Setor &IsPrintSetor = false EndIf &TotFolVlrCre += &ConFolVlrCre &TotFolVlrDeb += &ConFolVlrDeb &TotFolVlrTot += &ConFolVlrTot Print DadosSintetico EndiF //EndIf EndFor
If &Ordem = 1 and &TotFolVlrCre > 0 Print TotalSetor &FilTotFolVlrCre += &TotFolVlrCre &FilTotFolVlrDeb += &TotFolVlrDeb &FilTotFolVlrTot += &TotFolVlrTot EndIf
&TotFolVlrCre = 0 &TotFolVlrDeb = 0 &TotFolVlrTot = 0 Print TotalFilial &FilTotFolVlrCre = 0 &FilTotFolVlrDeb = 0 &FilTotFolVlrTot = 0
Case &Tipo = 2//########################################################################################################## For each Order EmpCod,PesIsFun,PesSts,PesSetCod,PesRaz when &Ordem = 1 Order EmpCod,PesIsFun,PesSts,PesCod when &Ordem = 2 Order EmpCod,PesIsFun,PesSts,PesRaz when &Ordem = 2 Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PesIsFun = True Where PesSts = &PesSts Where PesSetCod = &SetCod when not &SetCod.IsEmpty() Where PesFunFilCod = &FolFilCod when not &FolFilCod.IsEmpty() //If (PesSalTotRec > 0) //######## FOLHA CONTÁBIL (QUENTE)########## &ConFolVlrCre = 0 &ConFolVlrDeb = 0 &TotConFolVlrCre = 0 &TotConFolVlrDeb = 0
If PesSetCod <> &AuxSetCod and &Ordem = 1 If &index = 2 and &TotFolVlrCre > 0 Print TotalSetor &FilTotFolVlrCre += &TotFolVlrCre &FilTotFolVlrDeb += &TotFolVlrDeb &FilTotFolVlrTot += &TotFolVlrTot &TotFolVlrCre = 0 &TotFolVlrDeb = 0 &TotFolVlrTot = 0 &TotConFolVlrCre = 0 &TotConFolVlrDeb = 0 EndIf
&PesSetNom = trim(str(PesSetCod))+' - '+trim(PesSetNom) &IsPrintSetor = true &AuxSetCod = PesSetCod &index = 2 EndIf
If &Ordem = 2 or &Ordem = 3 &FilTotFolVlrCre += &TotFolVlrCre &FilTotFolVlrDeb += &TotFolVlrDeb &FilTotFolVlrTot += &TotFolVlrTot &TotFolVlrCre = 0 &TotFolVlrDeb = 0 &TotFolVlrTot = 0 EndIf &FolFunCod = PesCod &FolPesRaz = PesCodRaz &FucNom = FucNom &in = 1
For each Order EmpCod,FPagCod,FPagLcfCod Where FPagPesCod = &FolFunCod Where FPagAno = &FolAno Where FPagMes = &FolMes Where FPagTip = TipoPagamentoFolha.FolhaMensal
&LcfCod = FPagLcfCod do 'getOperacao' if &LcfCreDeb = 'C' &ConFolVlrCre += FPagItemVlr Else &ConFolVlrDeb += FPagItemVlr Endif
If &IsPrintSetor = true and &Ordem = 1 Print Setor &IsPrintSetor = false EndIf
If &in = 1 Print DadosAnaliticos &in = 2 EndIf
&ConLcfNom = Trim(Str(FPagLcfCod))+' - '+trim(&LCfNom)
&ConFolVlrCre = 0 &ConFolVlrDeb = 0 if &LcfCreDeb = 'C' &ConFolVlrCre = FPagItemVlr &TotConFolVlrCre += FPagItemVlr Else &ConFolVlrDeb = FPagItemVlr &TotConFolVlrDeb += FPagItemVlr Endif
Print Folhas EndFor &ConFolVlrTot = 0 &ConFolVlrTot = (&TotConFolVlrCre - &TotConFolVlrDeb) If &ConFolVlrTot > 0 Print TotalFolhas EndIF
&TotFolVlrCre += &TotConFolVlrCre &TotFolVlrDeb += &TotConFolVlrDeb &TotFolVlrTot += &ConFolVlrTot
//EndIf EndFor
If &Ordem = 1 and &TotFolVlrCre > 0 Print TotalSetor EndIf
&TotFolVlrCre = 0 &TotFolVlrDeb = 0 &TotFolVlrTot = 0
Print TotalFilial &FilTotFolVlrCre = 0 &FilTotFolVlrDeb = 0 &FilTotFolVlrTot = 0 EndCase
Footer print Rodape End
Sub 'FilialSelecionada' For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod Where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod Where FilCod = &FolFilCod &FilRaz = FilRaz Exit EndFor EndSub
Sub 'getOperacao' &LCfNom.SetEmpty() For Each ORder EmpCod, LcfCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where LcfCod = &LcfCod
&LcfCreDeb = LcfCreDeb &LCfNom = LcfNom
Exit EndFor EndSub

Property.Name: RPT_TEXT
Property.Value: Respeite o meio ambiente. Evite a impressão deste documento!
